prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MILITARY-CITY-50PC-SET-BUN Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 50pc Special Forces Command Micro Wheels Kids Diecast Toy Car Playset Description: The 50pc Special Forces Rescue Toy Set from Kidplokio is a great addition to any kid's toy car collection. Each set comes with all the rescue vehicles and soldiers needed to protect and rescue other toys: tanks, trucks, planes, soldiers, and even helicopters.

Each set is constructed of Die Cast metal and durable plastic, and all vehicles feature free-moving wheels. Kids will love zooming around pretend areas with these toy cars.

This is a great gift idea for young kids and toy car collectors alike. Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts) Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toy play set kids toy cars toy cars for boys special forces toys army toys kids army sets army men pretend play toy sets expression toys gifts for boys christmas gifts for boys kids toy cars for toddlers ages 3 to 5 toy army men sets Features: - SPECIAL FORCES TOY SET - Kidplokio "special forces" pretend play toy set comes with fun commando-themed toys for boys - tanks, trucks, planes, traffic cones, and helicopters - DIE-CAST CONSTRUCTION - Toy vehicles and characters are made of durable, high-quality die-cast metal and plastic; ideal for indoor or outdoor play - RESCUE-THEMED - Set features rescue-themed vehicles, soldiers, and equipment; Great gift idea for kids who love action figures and movies - SAFE FOR KIDS - All pieces included are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Choking hazard (small parts) - SPECIFICATIONS - Number of pieces: 50; Colors: assorted; Theme: rescue/special forces; Recommended age: 3+ years; Material: die cast, plastic === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
